title: acinos alpinus subsp. meridionalis
intro: Acinos alpinus subsp. meridionalis, also known as Mediterranean thyme or mountain acinos, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation, relieving stress, and promoting wound healing. Acinos alpinus subsp. meridionalis is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be consumed or applied to the skin to harness its medicinal properties.
